title: Company Information
content: Intandokazi Herbal Products provides natural remedies for various concerns including skin issues, isichitho, love matters, luck, and fertility. Branches: Durban | PMB | Cape Town | Johannesburg. Operating Hours: Mon - Fri | 09:00 - 17:00. Urgent calls only: 062 584 2441 (No WhatsApp calls please). Order follow-up: Please wait 5 days after confirmation before following up.
